svg.text: U1, U2 = NE555 · U3, U4 = 74HC00 quad NAND · U5 = 74HC175 quad D-FF (common CLK, common /MR) · U6 = 74HC74 dual D-FF
CLK = OSC·SEL_RUN_S + STEP_PULSE·SEL_STEP_S · all flip-flops clock on /OSC, so selects and pulses only change while the gated sources are stable
Reset: S4 asserts /MR asynchronously (also kills any in-flight step pulse); /RST releases two /OSC edges after S4 is let go. 100n decoupling per IC not shown.
